Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust 95 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. From birds to brains: My path to the fusiform face area (2024) 22 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Computational Physics (2nd Edition) 61 upvotes, 7 comments
  4. Tracing Goroutines in Realtime with eBPF 46 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. Nanocode: The best Claude Code that $200 can buy in pure JAX on TPUs 96 upvotes, 18 comments
  6. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 98 upvotes, 19 comments
  7. Gemma 4 on iPhone 89 upvotes, 20 comments
  8. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 421 upvotes, 126 comments
  9. The Enigma of Gertrude Stein 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  10. Baby's Second Garbage Collector 34 upvotes, 6 comments
  11. Show HN: Enter an Instagram/TikTok handle, get a data-backed price for collab 32 upvotes, 6 comments
  12. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 217 upvotes, 73 comments
  13. Perfmon – Consolidate your favorite CLI monitoring tools into a single TUI 30 upvotes, 6 comments
  14. Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network 97 upvotes, 34 comments
  15. Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code 56 upvotes, 17 comments
  16. Caveman: Why use many token when few token do trick 560 upvotes, 275 comments
  17. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input 97 upvotes, 40 comments
  18. My Google Workspace account suspension 295 upvotes, 155 comments
  19. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 231 upvotes, 121 comments
  20. LÖVE: 2D Game Framework for Lua 41 upvotes, 15 comments
  21. The threat is comfortable drift toward not understanding what you're doing 722 upvotes, 479 comments
  22. Bacteria found in the human intestine capable of improving muscle strength 80 upvotes, 41 comments
  23. LibreOffice – Let's put an end to the speculation 74 upvotes, 38 comments
  24. Finnish sauna heat exposure induces stronger immune cell than cytokine responses 258 upvotes, 175 comments
  25. Just 'English with Hanzi' 58 upvotes, 32 comments
  26. Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon [video] 301 upvotes, 219 comments
  27. Microsoft Hasn't Had a Coherent GUI Strategy Since Petzold 22 upvotes, 11 comments
  28. Phone-free bars and restaurants on the rise across the U.S. 109 upvotes, 87 comments
  29. Codex pricing to align with API token usage, instead of per-message 181 upvotes, 156 comments
